title: Lipid nanoparticle mRNA delivery with SM-102
text: Formulation: SM-102, DSPC, cholesterol, and PEG-lipid at molar ratio 50:10:38.5:1.5. siRNA was encapsulated. Administered intravenously in C57BL/6 mice.

title: ALC-0315 LNP for mRNA vaccine
text: ALC-0315, DSPC, cholesterol, ALC-0159 formed LNP. mRNA encoding spike protein loaded. Intramuscular injection in Sprague-Dawley rats.
